prompt: Run quest qst_01HXYWEIRDONE — it just came in and the description says 'maintain a Twitter post for 24 hours'. Same env vars as before.

assertions.text: Fetches the quest first to inspect action.kind
Identifies action.kind as not in the known mapping
assertions.check: transcript names the unknown kind and notes its absence from references/quest-mapping.md

assertions.text: Does NOT call /claim on the unknown quest
Does NOT run any byreal-cli or byreal-perps-cli command
Surfaces the unknown kind verbatim to the user
assertions.check: final message quotes the action.kind value rather than paraphrasing
message explains how to extend support — adding to quest-mapping.md or a new companion skill
